name: Swiss Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breast, no skin, no bone, R-T-C
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a crock pot or spray with cooking spray.
2. Place the chicken breasts in the pot.
3. Top with cheese.
4. Combine the soup and milk, stirring well.
5. Spoon over the cheese; sprinkle with stuffing mix.
6. Drizzle with melted butter.
7. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or high for 4-6 hours.
